feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP DM - ERP - EWM Integration/Staging Problems
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

unfortunately, I have a problem that I can't get any further with. We have integrated SAP Digital Manufacturing with an S4/HANA On Premise System and now want to integrate SAP Extended Warehouse Management into the production process to use the advanced production integration.

The Integration with ERP-DM works. We receive orders in DM, can start and complete them and send the confirmation back to ERP.

Now our main goal is to activate the MES-driven staging for the SAP DM System. We started with customizing EWM and are now at the point, were we successfully create the PMR in EWM. We can not trigger staging from there, as we don't receive anything in the Manage Orders 2.0 App in DM.  

This is the only thing we receive in the Integration Message Dashboard:

One failed EWM Staging Request per production order:

Please let me know if you have any ideas. 😅

entry.title: /SCWM/PI_COMPL_CHECK completeness without stock checkbox
entry.content:
Trying to get a better understanding of this checkbox. The help says:

Completeness Without Stock

Use

If you select this checkbox, you can set a product to complete even if it has no stock in the warehouse.

However, when we select this checkbox for a product and execute, it still shows as not completed.

entry.title: Passing custom field to warehouse task
entry.content:
Our requirement is to automatically create Pick task in WM after the Outbound delivery is created. We realized that the Source bin field must populated to create the Pick Warehouse task. I created a custom field in Sale order item level to store the Source bin value. I passed it then to the Outbound delivery. But after the delivery is created I want to pass it to warehouse task.

I need the following data

  1. How to access the Source bin custom field at the Warehouse task level?(The custom field business scenario to pass the field from delivery to Warehouse task is already activated?
  2.  Which BADI can I use to pass the source bin value to Pick task?
  3. How to automate the pick task creation?

br

Vibha


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sloc to sloc against the bin to bin transfer
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Business have two Slocs -0099, 018T, below that we have single warehouse 800 and storage type 200, two bin values BK-FG-99 , 38-01-01. 

Business transfers the Blocked stock from 0099 location to 018T within the two bins.

In system development - A material doc. will be created with the mvt type 325 and with the ref of PCN number from material doc we are creating and confirming the TO from source bin to intrim bin . Next 999 mvt transaction is posted and TO will get confirmed from intrim bin to destination bin.

As per the mentioned above system development process the to the destination bin the TO is not getting created.

Kinldy suggest any alternative process.

Thanks,
Saikumar

entry.title: Can't found app "Manage Production Supply Areas"
entry.content:
Hello experts, We encountered an issue in scope item 3DV during the preliminary step where we need to create a Control Cycle. To create the Control Cycle, we must input a Supply Area, but it is not available on our test system. We wanted to create Supply area but we were unable to find the app „Manage Production Supply Area“.

The prerequisite for this step is “Maintain production Supply Area - MDS (3KS)” from the Warehouse Management Setup Guide.docx (Public).

When we open the 3KS his Business condition we can see that prerequisite is 40D that is used for creating Supply area. Create Warehouse Master Data for Production Supply (3KS) 

 

And when we open 40D to Create Production Supply area there is mention of APP “Manage production Supply Area” but we can’t find the app on our system. Create Production Supply Area (40D) | SAP Help Portal

Although we found a note about hidden applications in the SAP Fiori launchpad, we still haven’t located the desired application.

Could you please assist us in finding the Manage Production Supply Areas app so that we can proceed with creating the Supply Area? Thank you in advance for your help. Best regards,

entry.title: Hi Guru's , Can any one help me with EWM Production issues .
entry.content:
Hi Guru's ,

Can any one help me with EWM Production issues .

B Regards,

Viswanath

entry.title: Pysical inventory document creation for product not assigned to warehouse/plant
entry.content:
Hi,

A user accidentally created an inventory document via the transaction /scwm/pi_create for a product that did not exist in the plant and warehouse.

When booking the difference in the difference analyzer, a queue was created with the message that the product was not active in the plant.
I was wondering if there is a setting that does not allow the user to enter a product upon creation of an inventory document that is not active for the warehouse in which they are working?

Many thanks for your answers!

Best regards,

Michaël

entry.title: Warehouse Picking by 2 workers
entry.content:
Hi Guru's ,
In a Warehouse , a worker lifted the product from a high rack ST and handed over to another worker.

How will we configure this case in EWM system.

B Regards,

Viswanath

entry.title: transferring Inbound Delivery from ERP S4 to EWM we are getting error
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

 

While transferring inbound  delivery from ERP S4 to EWM we are getting below errors.

 Could not create header data delivery 0180000004, system S4D_XXX   /SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION 12 018XXXXX

 Error during mapping: material 000000000010000002 does not exist 

/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION 88 0180XXXXXX

Cannot create item 000010 of delivery 01800XXXXXX  from system S4D_XXX   /SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION 13 0180000004 10

 Could not determine EWM stock data for: Storage Location 1201 ZROD /SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION 112 01800XXXX 10

 

Please help in solving this error.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: HSM Checks at EWM for USA
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

We are currently in the process of implementing the new S/4HANA system, and part of this implementation involves the integration of Hazardous Substance Management.

The requirement is to conduct HSM Checks at EWM, with a specific focus on operations in the USA. To my knowledge, the HSM functionality is currently tailored to support operations in Germany.

We need to ascertain if 3E will be able to provide the necessary content data for this implementation !!!

Your prompt response on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance !!

Ramu Mannava

entry.title: Warehouse task creation based on previous warehouse task confirmation
entry.content:
Hi All,

Below is our requirement.

IBD created

Post goods receipt

Inspection lot creation

Warehouse task created (PPF conditions) (Source bin GR-ZONE -destination Quarantine bin)

Warehouse task confirmed (Stock moved to Quarantine bin not final bin)

UD completed (Based on follow on function a warehouse task should create and move to Staging area

Warehouse task created (Source quarantine bin- destination Staging area bin)

Warehouse task confirmed ( stock updated in Staging area bin)

Once warehouse task is confirmed another warehouse task should create to final putaway bin based on the PACI

The above is our requirement, we can use POSC or LOSC but business is not ready to use HU.

We want to use custom logic or enhancement. We are trying to use the PPF.

Request your valuable advise

Regards,

Chand

entry.title: Items with no warehouse process type must not be packed
entry.content:
Hi All,

When performing Receiving HU by Manufacturing Order, i got below error message, what customizing do i miss?

entry.title: Are there SAP Signavio BPMN templates for eSPP processes?
entry.content:
Dear all,

on behalf of a colleague I was checking for BPMN models for SAP Signavio for processes related to eSPP. I checked the SAP Signavio Process Explorer (template library), and could find high level process landscapes, but no documented processes. Does anyone know a source for eSPP process templates? Would you also be interested in such templates?

Regards,

Swen

entry.title: Partial and Full Pallet Picking from same storage type
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a below Scenario:

A Storage type with multiple Aisles. Out of 5, 4 has partial picking whereas 1 aisle need to have full pallet picking due to space constraints.

is there any way we can always perform the full pallet picking from bins of 1 Asile whereas partial picking from other aisles.

In case of full pallet picking, it will be taken the repacking area to pack in to another HU.

Here Qty. Classification won't help because it is not that, for certain material and based on Qty we can decide the packing behavior.

 

We thought of creating separate storage type for full pallet picking aisle.

Is there any other way we can achieve this.

Thanks and regards,

Atul

entry.title: Set up and apply for strict FIFO method
entry.content:
Dear all, 

I need to set up strict FIFO method for all storage type in EWM. 

But I failed to find the configuration about " activate storage typ determination/ German: Lagertypfindung aktivieren" in the app "configure your solution".

The target ist to put the removal strategie / german: Auslagerungsstrategie "***" in the column of "storage typ"  unter " activate storage type "to set up the strict FIFO for all relevant storage type in EWM.

Could you pls kindly provide some tipps oder test script / ticket notes for further the processing?

thank your very much in advance

Xiawei 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Bonded warehouse implementation in existing EWM warehouse
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,


We are planning to implement bonded warehouse solution in EWM for a warehouse.
Kindly help to provide any configuration document and integration settings required between EWM, GTS and ECC systems
We are using EWM 9.5 decentral currently.


Requirement details in brief:
1. Currently warehouse 1234 running on EWM
2. Business wants to keep the bonded warehouse stocks coming from manufacturing plant to this plant.
3. they will separate bonded and non bonded stocks separately using stock type or other parameters.
4. during goods receipt and before putaway, customs declaration to be done (integration with GTS)
5. during goods issue also for both domestic and export (after or before PGI) customs declaration to be done.
6. scrapping and other internal warehouse processes warehouse customs update is required.

We have no knowledge on what configuration needs to be activated from EWM side.
Kindly advise with any documents, what configurations, business functions needs to be activated to work with standard systems.
Once we know what are all work with standard plugins, then we want to work on the Gaps for different business requirements.

Many thanks in anticipation.

Thanks,
Hari.

EWM - Interfaces SAP Global Trade Services SAP Community EWM - Master Data EWM - Goods Movement EWM - Basic Functions

entry.title: Cancellation of GR in embedded EWM while Inspection lot summarization is activated.
entry.content:
Hello community, 

Business needs to activate Inspection lot summarization in material master data in Quality tab. 

On EWM side we would have a problem to cancel GR in case inbound delivery has a link to already existing inspection lot. System will show message: HU content was changed - GR cancellation not possible, /SCWM/GM069. 

Solution provided in note https://me.sap.com/notes/3298538/E does not work, solution provided in https://me.sap.com/notes/3052659 is not acceptable by Logistic business. 

Does anyone has better solution/workaround in such a case? 

Thank you in advance.

#EWM/QM_integration

entry.title: WM 9.5 vs. RISE embedded WMS
entry.content:
Hi,

I am searching for an information or a content that compares WMS 9.5 and RISE embedded WMS functionality to build a value proposition for the customer. The customer has got WMS 9.5 and we would like to demonstrate the RISE embedded WMD implementation related value to support the RISE transformation. 

thanks in advance,

Mehmet

Supply Chain Value Advisor APJ

entry.title: Negative stock ODO goods issue not possible
Create a PI doc after confirmation WT
entry.content:
Hi experts,

My customer wants to automatically create an inactive PI document after confirmation, for example, 40 WTs per product. Can I do this using EWM standards?
